entry.title: 2025 Ford Transit Cargo Van
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Transit Cargo Van offered in OXFORD WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

2 Additional Keys ($75 value)

  • Includes 2 additional keys, for a total of 4, with FOBs.

SYNC 3 with 4 In. Multi-Functional Display ($280 value)

  • Includes SYNC 3 entertainment system, AM/FM stereo, 4.0 in. display, Bluetooth, and dual USB ports.

253-Degree Opening 50/50 Hinged Rear Door ($75 value)

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8279 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! 330 Transit Road Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by Ford Motor Company and/or Ford Credit. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Transit Cargo Van T-250 148 MED RF 9150 GV offered in Oxford White will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Order Code 101A

  • 10-Speed Automatic Transmission with OD and SelectShift
  • 16" Silver Steel Wheels with Silver Hubcaps
  • 9,150 lbs GVWR
  • AM/FM Stereo
  • 235/65R16C 121/119 R AS BSW Tires

Heavy-Duty Trailer Tow Package ($485 value)

  • Frame Mounted Hitch Receiver
  • Tow/Haul Mode with Trailering Wiring Provisions

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 3.5L ECOBOOST V6, OXFORD WHITE Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford E-Series Cutaway E-350 DRW 138 WB offered in OXFORD WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Exterior and Appearance

  • Steel wheels are economical and provide proven durability.

In-car Entertainment

  • Wireless audio streaming - Strike the cord. With wireless streaming, the endless library of music on your mobile device is available through your vehicle's sound system! Make a playlist befitting of your road trip as it rolls along; let the back seat passengers control the selection; catch up on your favorite podcasts. With wireless audio streaming, all you have to do is press play.

Powertrain and Mechanical

  • Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same? With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

Safety and Security

  • Tracker system - Lost and found. This built-in tracker system can pinpoint your vehicle's location giving you the peace of mind that your vehicle is where it's supposed to be, or if it isn't. This system is useful for keeping an eye on teen drivers, fleet vehicles, or finding your vehicle if it has been stolen. Know exactly where your vehicle is at all times when you have this tracker system.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.

entry.title: 2026 Ford F-150 LARIAT
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford F-150 LARIAT offered in Avalanche will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Equipment Group 500A Standard

  • Electronic 10-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • ActiveX Trimmed Bucket Seats
  • 7,100 lbs Payload Package GVWR
  • B&O Sound System by Bang and Olufsen
  • 275/65R18 BSW A/T Tires
  • 18" Chrome-Like PVD Wheels
  • 3.31 Axle Ratio

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
  • BlueCruise hands-on cruise control with lane change
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford F-150 XLT offered in OXFORD WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Full Coverage Rubber Floor Mats ($200 value)

    Manual Telescoping/Power Glass/Manual Folding Trailer Tow Mirrors ($275 value)

    • Includes manual telescoping and manual-folding power heated side view mirrors with black mirror caps and integrated turn signals, and black mirror caps.

    Bed Utility Package ($860 value)

    • Includes LED box lighting w/ zone lighting, four BoxLink premium locking cleats, tailgate step, and tailgate work surface.

    Tow/Haul Package ($1,010 value)

    • Includes integrated trailer brake controller, electronic locking rear differential, and upgraded rear bumper.

    3.55 Electronic Locking Axle Ratio (Tow/Haul Upgrade) ($395 value)

      Equipment Group 303A ($11,915 value)

      • Includes vehicle with standard equipment, 20 x 8.5 inch chrome PVD wheels with 275/60R20 all-terrain tires, 6 inch chrome angular running boards, chrome door handles, black mesh grille with chrome center bar, chrome exhaust tip, manual-folding power heated side view mirrors with chrome mirror caps and integrated turn signals, auto-dimming rearview mirror, Intelligent Access with push button start, remote engine start, remote tailgate release, dual-zone electronic automatic temperature control, cloth 40/console/40 front seat and flow-through console with steering column-mounted shift, 10-way power adjustable driver seat with power lumbar, 8-way power adjustable passenger seat with power lumbar, heated front seats, power adjustable pedals with memory, interior work surface, 110V/400W outlet in the instrument panel and pickup bed, partitioned lockable fold-flat storage, power-sliding rear window, B&O 640-watt sound system with 8 speakers and subwoofer, connected navigation (1-year trial), 360 degree camera, front parking sensors, adaptive cruise control with stop-and-go, lane centering, automatic emergency braking with oncoming traffic detection, evasive steering assist, driver state detection, Pro Trailer Backup Assist, and Pro Trailer Hitch Assist.

      Convenience

      • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
      • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

      Safety and Security

      • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
      • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

      Technology and Telematics

      • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
      Other notable features: Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8279 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! 330 Transit Road Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by Ford Motor Company and/or Ford Credit. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. entry.title: 2025 Ford Bronco Sport Big Bend
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Bronco Sport Big Bend offered in SHADOW BLACK will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Black Diamond Off-Road Package ($2,570 value)

  • Includes 110V/400W AC power outlet, aux switches and wiring, brush guard, black molded-in-color front and rear bumpers with steel plates, cargo mat, cargo management system (shelf/divider/table), Class II trailer tow package with trailer sway control, fender tie downs, front row and passenger side interior grab handles, two front casted recovery hooks, two rear D-ring recovery hooks, carpeted second row seatback with rubberized seatback mat, under engine steel skid plate, steel fuel tank shields, steel canister shield, 17 inch Carbonized Gray painted aluminum wheels, and 225/65R17 all-terrain tires.

Convenience Package ($1,895 value)

  • Includes LED fog lamps, 8-way power driver's seat (fore/aft, up/down, recline, lumbar), front driver/passenger seat back map pockets, heated front row seats, premium wrapped steering wheel, and universal garage door opener.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

Ford Co-Pilot360 1.0 ($795 value)

  • Includes automatic emergency braking, rearview camera, rear parking sensors, automatic high beams, blind spot information system with cross-traffic alert, evasive steering assist, lane-keeping alert, lane-keeping aid, driver alert, intersection assist, and pre-collision assist with pedestrian detection and forward collision warning and dynamic brake support.

4K Tow Package ($745 value)

  • Includes 215/70R17 conventional spare tire, higher capacity radiator (2.0L gas engines only), trailer brake controller, trailer hitch 2 in. receiver with 4-pin and 7-pin connector, transmission oil cooler, and upgraded cooling fan.

Safety and Security

Technology and Telematics

  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

entry.title: 2026 Ford Escape Active
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Escape Active offered in Agate Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

    • Includes 110V/400W AC power outlet, aux switches and wiring, brush guard, black molded-in-color front and rear bumpers with steel plates, cargo mat, cargo management system (shelf/divider/table), Class II trailer tow package with trailer sway control, fender tie downs, front row and passenger side interior grab handles, two front casted recovery hooks, two rear D-ring recovery hooks, carpeted second row seatback with rubberized seatback mat, under engine steel skid plate, steel fuel tank shields, steel canister shield, 17 inch Carbonized Gray painted aluminum wheels, and 225/65R17 all-terrain tires.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

entry.title: 2025 Ford Bronco Sport Big Bend
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2025 Ford Bronco Sport Big Bend offered in Azure Gray Metallic Tri-Coat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Azure Gray Metallic Tri-Coat Paint ($995 value)

    Black Diamond Off-Road Package ($2,570 value)

    • Includes 110V/400W AC power outlet, aux switches and wiring, brush guard, black molded-in-color front and rear bumpers with steel plates, cargo mat, cargo management system (shelf/divider/table), Class II trailer tow package with trailer sway control, fender tie downs, front row and passenger side interior grab handles, two front casted recovery hooks, two rear D-ring recovery hooks, carpeted second row seatback with rubberized seatback mat, under engine steel skid plate, steel fuel tank shields, steel canister shield, 17 inch Carbonized Gray painted aluminum wheels, and 225/65R17 all-terrain tires.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: ENGINE: 1.5L ECOBOOST, AZURE GRAY METALLIC TRI-COAT Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. This 2026 Ford Escape ST-Line Select offered in Rapid Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Tech Pack #2 ($3,700 value)

  • 10-Way Power Driver Seat
  • 12.3" Digital Productivity Screen in Instrument Panel Cluster
  • 360-Degree Camera with Split View
  • 6-Way Power Front Passenger Seat
  • B&O Sound System by Bang & Olufsen
  • HD Radio
  • Memory Package
  • Connected Navigation (1-Year Included)
  • Wireless Charging Pad
  • Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist 2.0
  • Body Color Mirrors
  • SYNC 4 with Enhanced Voice Recognition

Equipment Group 401A ($1,125 value)

  • 8-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • 2.0L EcoBoost Engine with Auto Start-Stop Technology
  • 4,760 lbs GVWR
  • Partial Vinyl/cloth Heated Front Sport Contour Bucket Seats with Red Stitching
  • Tire Inflator and Sealant Kit
  • AM/FM Stereo with SiriusXM 360L Radio
  • 225/60R18 100H All Season BSW Tires
  • 18" Rock Metallic Painted Aluminum Wheels

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: 2.0L ECOBOOST ENGINE W/AUTO START-STOP TECHNOLOGY, RAPID RED METALLIC TINTED CLEARCOAT Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Explorer ST-Line offered in Star White Metallic Tri-Coat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE: 2.3L ECOBOOST I-4, STAR WHITE METALLIC TRI-COAT Napleton Columbus Ford is proud to serve customers in communities that include Milwaukee, Madison, Green Bay, Kenosha, Racine, Appleton, Waukesha, Oshkosh, Eau Claire, Janesville, West Allis, La Crosse, Sheboygan, Wauwatosa, Fond du Lac, New Berlin, Brookfield, Wausau, Beloit, Greenfield, Manitowoc, Franklin, Oak Creek, West Bend, Sun Prairie, Superior, Stevens Point, Neenah, De Pere, Mequon and Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 920-212-8279 or stop by to test drive or inquire about your new car or truck today! 330 Transit Road Columbus WI 53925 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by Ford Motor Company and/or Ford Credit. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors may occur. Please verify all information with a Napleton Autos Client Advisor. You may do so by contacting us directly or visiting the dealership.

entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possibly can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2026 Ford Bronco Outer Banks offered in Marsh Gray will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Equipment Group 314A Lux Package ($2,825 value)

  • 360-Degree Camera
  • 10-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • Adaptive Cruise Control
  • Evasive Steering Assist
  • Front Parking Sensors
  • Information on Demand Panel
  • B&O Sound System by Bang and Olufsen
  • Sideview Mirrors
  • 3.73 Axle Ratio
  • Heated Leather-Trimmed/vinyl Bucket Seats
  • P255/70R18 A/T Tires
  • 18" Bright Machined Aluminum Wheels

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2026 Ford Explorer ST offered in Vapor Blue Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. Convenience

  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
  • Lane Centering hands-on cruise control with lane change
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.   • 10-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • Engine: 3.0L EcoBoost V6
  • Heated/ventilated Miko Suede Captain's Chairs
  • 6,200 lbs GVWR
  • P275/45R21 AS BSW Tires
  • 21" Magnetite-Painted Aluminum Wheels

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

                • Includes 18 x 8.5 inch six-spoke machined-aluminum wheels with gloss black painted pockets, 275/65R18 OWL all-terrain tires, accent-color step bars, dark two-bar style grille with dark surround, body-color front and rear bumpers, box side decal, chrome single-tip exhaust, unique interior finish, front bucket seats, and flow-through console with floor shifter.

                B&O Sound System Unleashed by Bang & Olufsen with HD Radio ($695 value)

                • Includes B&O 1080-watt sound system with 18 speakers and subwoofer, and HD radio.

                PowerBoost 3.5L Hybrid Twin Turbo V6 Engine Package ($3,300 value)

                • Includes PowerBoost 3.5L Hybrid Twin Turbo V6 engine with 1.5 kWh lithium-ion battery pack.

                Bed Utility Package ($995 value)

                • Includes LED box lighting w/ zone lighting, four BoxLink premium locking cleats, power tailgate, tailgate step, and tailgate work surface

                Wireless Charging Pad ($145 value)

                  Equipment Group 502A ($4,805 value)

                  • Includes 20 x 8.5 inch chrome PVD wheels, LED projector dynamic bending headlamps, LED taillamps, heated rear seats, power tilt/telescoping steering column with memory, wireless charging pad, rain sensing wipers, intelligent adaptive cruise control with stop-and-go, lane centering, speed sign recognition, evasive steering assist, intersection assist, and connected built-in navigation.

                  Safety and Security

                  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
                  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.

                  Technology and Telematics

                  • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
                  • AppLink/Apple CarPlay and Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
                  • AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

This 2026 Ford F-150 XLT offered in Ruby Red Metallic Tinted Clearcoat will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

XLT Black Appearance Package ($420 value)

  • Body-Color Front and Rear Bumpers
  • Body-Color Door Handles
  • Black Exterior Badging
  • Black Grille
  • Dark Interior Appliques
  • Gray Box Side Decal
  • Unique Sport Cloth 40/console/40 Front-Seats
  • 18" Gloss Black Wheels
  • 6" Black Running Boards

Equipment Group 302A Mid ($5,330 value)

  • Black Platform Running Boards
  • Electronic 10-Speed Automatic Transmission
  • Body-Color Door Handles
  • Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist 2.0
  • Dual-Zone Electronic Automatic Temperature Control
  • Ford Connectivity Package (1-Year Included)
  • Heated Front Seats
  • 400W Pro Power Onboard (cab & Bed)
  • Intelligent Access with Push Button Start
  • Power Glass Heated Sideview Mirrors
  • Remote Start System with Remote Tailgate Release
  • Power-Sliding Rear Window
  • 6,650 lbs Payload Package GVWR
  • AM/FM Stereo with SiriusXM 360L
  • 275/65R18 BSW A/T Tires
  • Wrapped Steering Wheel

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

Technology and Telematics

  • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
    • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • SYNC 4 AppLink/Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
